hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"MANDATORY FIRST STEP: on ANY question or task about THIS repository, you MUST first obtain the full repository state by invoking the explore-codebase skill — before answering or acting. Never answer a repo question from partial or grep-only context. The skill runs the repo map, has you reflect on it, and read the key files. Re-invoke it whenever you need to refresh the whole-repo view."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"You are a subagent starting fresh. If your task needs an understanding of this repository beyond the specific files named in your prompt, invoke the explore-codebase skill first to build the whole-repo picture (run the map AND reflect), then proceed."}}'
